title: Bear Embroidery Patches-8 PCS Cute Iron on DIY Patch Decorative Applique Patch, Sew on Patches Cartoon Animal Embroidery Sewing for Jeans Shoes Backpacks T-Shirt Caps
features: Package includes: You will receive 8 pieces of cute bear embroidery pieces in 4 colours, dark coffee, light coffee, beige and white. Enough to meet your daily DIY sewing needs

High quality: These iron on patches are made of high quality cloudy velvet material, soft to the touch, well made, natural texture details, not easy to fade and break. They remain in place after washing and can be used for a long time.

Perfect size: These patches sewn on knitted blankets measure 8cm by 6.5cm, which is a good size for sewing on a variety of fabrics. Please note that due to the handmade nature of these patches, sizes may vary slightly.

Cute design: This embroidered patch is designed with a cute bear pattern and has a unique shape and bright colors. It can be easily matched with different colors and styles of clothes, giving you a wonderful visual experience.

Widely used: The cute bear patch can be decorated on any type of knitting projects, including trousers, skirts, hats, pillows, scarves, quilts, shoes, bags and so on. Ideal for arts and crafts projects.
description: 8 PCS Cute Bear Decorative Applique Patch,DIY Sew on Patches Cartoon Animal Embroidery,Iron On Sewing for Jeans Shoes Backpacks T-Shirt Caps
